parameters.query: SELECT tenant_id, business_id FROM table_1 column_1 $1 column_2 now() LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO table_2
  (tenant_id, business_id, product_name, display_name, minio_url, minio_key, mime_type, upload_source, image_type, show_on_store)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'catalogue_manager', 'product', true)
RETURNING id::text, product_name, display_name, minio_url, price, show_on_store, image_type

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Preserve Binary').first().json.tenant_id,
  $('Preserve Binary').first().json.business_id,
  $('Preserve Binary').first().json.product_name,
  $('Preserve Binary').first().json.minio_url,
  $('Preserve Binary').first().json.object_key,
  $('Preserve Binary').first().json.mime_type
] }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE table_2 column_3 CASE WHEN $2 = 'display_name'  THEN $3::text    ELSE display_name  END,
  price         = CASE WHEN $2 = 'price'          THEN $4::numeric ELSE price         END,
  show_on_store = CASE WHEN $2 = 'show_on_store'  THEN $5::boolean ELSE show_on_store END,
  sort_order    = CASE WHEN $2 = 'sort_order'     THEN $6::int     ELSE sort_order    END,
  updated_at    = now()
column_4 $1::uuid column_5 $7::uuid
RETURNING id::text

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Prepare Update').first().json.id,
  $('Prepare Update').first().json.field,
  $('Prepare Update').first().json.field === 'display_name'  ? String($('Prepare Update').first().json.castValue ?? '') : null,
  $('Prepare Update').first().json.field === 'price'         ? $('Prepare Update').first().json.castValue : null,
  $('Prepare Update').first().json.field === 'show_on_store' ? $('Prepare Update').first().json.castValue : null,
  $('Prepare Update').first().json.field === 'sort_order'    ? $('Prepare Update').first().json.castValue : null,
  $('Prepare Update').first().json.tenant_id
] }}

parameters.query: DELETE FROM table_2 column_4 $1::uuid column_5 $2::uuid RETURNING id::text
